description: Create an Impact Assessment Method named 'Shadow Carbon Price 2026' in OpenLCA. Include an impact category 'Carbon Liability' with reference unit 'USD' (or 'Item'/'Unit'). Assign characterization factors (USD/kg) for emissions to air: 'Carbon dioxide' (0.10), 'Methane' (2.80), and 'Nitrogen oxides' (0.50). Calculate the LCIA results for a product system based on the 'Transport, combination truck, long-haul, diesel powered' process from the USLCI database using this method. Export the results to '~/LCA_Results/truck_carbon_liability.csv'.
